base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: This should test charm_wall_breakaway_long reachability on the run_029 leader base while preserving convex payoff behavior. Desired result is added or restored charm-wall trades with no slow >=12h trades, profile PnL/exposure near or above 225, total net profit within 98% of run_029, and global worst MAE no worse than -513.4. Main tradeoff is that the stronger higher-high/higher-low pair may remain too selective and produce a flat run.
label: promote
rationale: Use Batch D as one logical strategy-profile family because the best-by-score base is run_029, latest run_043 is a rejected indicator-timing pathology, and broad filters from run_043 retain too little PnL. This is not the duplicate run_033 keyset and does not repeat the failed charm-wall exit compression or ES-VWAP cap. It probes the strategist's charm-wall reachability hypothesis with admission geometry only, preserving option-confirmed routing and avoiding missing/stale 0DTE optimization.
